docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC ORNAMENTAL IRON WORKS AS TO DEFENDANT PETER TOM REMODELING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ORNAMENTAL IRON WORKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETER TOM REMODELING $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,536.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
